sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54741" key="katapauste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-παυστέον</orth>, <sense id="n54741.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must stop, staunch</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὴν φορὰν</foreign> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τοῦ αἵματος</foreign>] <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl>(?)ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:50:3:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50.3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
